discovery_rules.description: Julia's fingerprint on the wine glass is revealed through lab analysis after discovering the glasses.
Mark's fingerprint on the desk is identified through lab analysis on Day 2.
The hallway camera footage becomes available after visiting the building hallway.
Elevator access logs become available after visiting the building hallway.
The parking lot camera footage becomes available after visiting the parking lot.
Sarah gives a more detailed testimony after being confronted with the hallway camera footage.
The shoe print in the hallway is discovered by forensics and analyzed in the lab.
The hidden safe is found after discovering the accounting irregularities and searching the office thoroughly.
Daniel's personal journal is found during a thorough search of his office on Day 3 or later.
Deleted messages are recovered from Julia's phone after obtaining a warrant.
Julia's shoes are seized from her residence under a search warrant for comparison with the hallway shoe print.
Julia's financial records become available through investigation on Day 3.
